creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Content-free PR; there really isn't anything in here that 
we could work with. 

You may want to consider posting a more carefully thought 
out request for help to the <freebsd-questions@FreeBSD.org> 
mailing list.  If you decide to do this, please take a  
look at http://www.lemis.com/questions.html first.
